items.name: Tree Pollen
items.advisory: The risk of tree pollen symptoms is high. Keep your windows closed and change clothing after returning to the indoors.

items.name: Dust & Dander
items.advisory: The risk of dust and dander allergy symptoms is high. Be sure you're vacuuming with a HEPA-approved filter.

items.name: Grass Pollen
items.advisory: The risk of grass pollen symptoms is moderate. Be sure to keep your windows and doors closed.

items.name: Ragweed Pollen
items.advisory: The risk for ragweed pollen symptoms is low.

items.name: Mold
items.advisory: The risk of mold allergy symptoms is low.
